# Ling-Jyh Chen Academic Website (Detailed LLM Guide)

## Scope
- Personal profile and affiliations
- Research overview and selected projects
- Publications by category
- Talks and invited speeches
- Courses and downloads

## Canonical URLs
- Home: https://cclljj.github.io/
- CV: https://cclljj.github.io/cv/
- Research: https://cclljj.github.io/research/
- Publications: https://cclljj.github.io/publications/
- Talks: https://cclljj.github.io/talks/
- Courses: https://cclljj.github.io/courses/
- Download: https://cclljj.github.io/download/
- Research Lab: https://cclljj.github.io/nrl/

## Publications Organization
Publications are presented on one consolidated page in this order:
1. Journal Articles
2. Conference Papers
3. Posters/Demo
4. Book Chapters
5. Technical Reports
6. Patents

Legacy publication category URLs may redirect to category anchors on:
- https://cclljj.github.io/publications/

## Machine-readable Endpoints
- Site JSON index: https://cclljj.github.io/index.json
- Section JSON examples:
  - https://cclljj.github.io/publications/index.json
  - https://cclljj.github.io/research/index.json
  - https://cclljj.github.io/talks/index.json
- Page JSON example:
  - https://cclljj.github.io/publications/journal/index.json
- Sitemap:
  - https://cclljj.github.io/sitemap.xml

## Crawl Guidance
- Respect canonical URLs.
- Prefer JSON endpoints for automated extraction.
- Use HTML pages for human-facing citation context and outbound links.
